config.coreconfig.switch_texture.desc: Use a switch texture for boolean options instead of a checkmark. This is purely visual and has no effect on functionality.
config.coreconfig.locked_option.desc: Changes the color of locked options
ui.coreconfig.no_config: No configuration has been set up for this mod!
ui.coreconfig.cant_save: You cannot save yet! Some options are invalid and need to be changed.
ui.coreconfig.restart_required_desc: Your changes have been saved, but one or more changes require a restart. Other changes that do not require a restart have been automatically applied.
ui.coreconfig.exit_without_saving_desc: Configuration changes you made will not save, and will be lost! Are you sure you want to do this?
error.coreconfig.lower_than_min_string:
§cLength is smaller than the minimum size!
§f(%s < %s)
error.coreconfig.higher_than_max_string:
§cLength is larger than the maximum size!
§f(%s > %s)
error.coreconfig.server_side: §cThis setting requires you to be the host of a world/server.
error.coreconfig.server_side_common: §cThis setting is being overridden by the server.
